title: Nearby Behavior Determines the Limit
text: A limit depends on what the graph approaches near the input, not on the filled point at the input itself.

title: Hand Sketch the Function
text: Sketch the line $$y=x+3$$, $$then$$ $$mark$$ $$the$$ $$open$$ $$circle$$ $$at$$ $$(2,5)$$ and the filled point at $$(2,1)$$ to visualize the behavior near $$x=2$$.
